topic.title: Important: Attendance Policy Clarification (INFO 7375)
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

This announcement serves as a clarification and reminder of the attendance policy for INFO 7375.

Attendance & In-Class Quizzes

  • Attendance is recorded weekly.

  • Failure to attend class or failure to attempt the required in-class quiz for that week will be recorded as an absence.

  • In-class quizzes must be attempted during the scheduled class time.

Make-Up Attendance (Weeks 1 & 2 Only)

  • Make-up attendance submissions were permitted only for Weeks 1 and 2, due to the add/drop period.

  • No make-up attendance options will be provided for classes missed after Week 2.

Important Notes

  • Students are allowed a maximum of two absences for the course.

  • Missing more than two classes may result in a failing grade and additional academic or administrative consequences, as outlined in course and university policy.

Please ensure that you attend all remaining classes and complete all required in-class quizzes to remain in good standing in the course.

If you have questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out via Microsoft Teams.

 

Best regards,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
